creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
Hello Andrey.

I have merged in most of the changes from Adaptec's more recent drivers,
including new hardware support.  There are still a few more changes that
I'll bring in at some point in the future.

Let me know if the driver in HEAD/RELENG_7/RELENG_6 is still missing
either hardware support or some feature you've noticed.

-Ed
